target_name: Trade Secret Guard: No uplift internals leaked via API
persona_bio: Security testing expert — scan all public APIs to ensure no uplift principle names, prompt templates, or interaction weights are exposed
domain_questions: Do any API responses contain references to specific uplift principles (P1-P47)?
Are any prompt template contents exposed?
Do benchmark responses only show results (scores, costs) not methods (injection payloads)?
Could a competitor reverse-engineer our uplift stack from these API responses?
